name: mfl-leagues
description: Asset repository for MyFantasyLeague.com custom styling and scripts

scripts.minify:js: terser public/js/common/header.js -o public/js/common/header.min.js -c -m && terser public/js/common/footer.js -o public/js/common/footer.min.js -c -m && terser public/js/common/scoreboard.js -o public/js/common/scoreboard.min.js -c -m && terser public/js/common/cyber-fab.js -o public/js/common/cyber-fab.min.js -c -m && terser public/js/common/fantasy-ticker.js -o public/js/common/fantasy-ticker.min.js -c -m && terser public/js/common/popup-gallery.js -o public/js/common/popup-gallery.min.js -c -m
scripts.minify: npm run minify:js && npm run minify:css
